name: Sketchbook
desc: A small, many-page book for sketching in, coupled with a simple charcoal pencil.

name: Quiver
desc: A quiver, capable of holding plenty of arrows for combat.
effect: This leather quiver is full of arrows that can be used as _Missiles_ for a variety of bows. Unless the character has specialized arrows, these are treated as a _Source_ 0 (_Metal_, _Wood_) and applicable attacks use _Metal_ as the _Material_.

name: Books
desc: A collection of assorted books that, while not useful to most, scholars can use as reference material.

name: Flask of Earthen Power
desc: A potion of concentrated earthcraft, filling you to the brim with spiritual power.
effect: A character's spirit may drink this while making _Camp_; if they do, they gain all the benefits of the _Channel_ _Camp Action_.

abilities.name: Drink
abilities.effect: Create an [_Opening_]. If you are an _Earthbound_, this _Round_ you may not be _Suppressed_ and immediately gain 4 _Essence_. If you are a Windbound, instead gain _Poisoned_ 5. Otherwise, gain _Poisoned_ 1.

name: Combat Waterflask
desc: A water-tight pouch containing a large amount of water with an easy-open lid for convenience.
effect: This may also be treated as _Supplies_ for the purpose of water; if it is, it may not be used until refilled with water.

name: Health Flask
desc: A potion that fills you with energy and staunches minor wounds.
effect: If used as _Medicine_, the target may mark an additional segment on their _Wound_ clock.

abilities.name: Drink
abilities.effect: Create an [_Opening_]. Restore all _Guard_, then restore 5 _Stamina_. If you are _Bleeding_, reduce the value by 5.

name: Caltrops
desc: A satchel full of small triangle spikes of metal that can be scattered to deny an area to foes.
effect: A small bag of metallic caltrops that can be used to deter enemies from entering a space. These are typically lost after use, but characters that have a way to quickly collect them may be able to reuse them. If used as a _Missile_, use _Scatter_ at no cost in the target's _Arena_. While _Worn_, this may be treated as an effectively unlimited source of _Source_ 0 (_Metal_) items.

abilities.name: Scatter
abilities.effect: You scatter metallic caltrops in the Target, creating dangerous terrain that makes the _Arena_ _Rough_. A creature may take 2 [_Stab_] Damage to ignore this effect for a single Move or _Negate_.

name: Flask of Oil
desc: A flask of highly flammable oil that can be used to start a fire almost anywhere.

abilities.name: Fling
abilities.special: You may attempt to throw this at a specific creature; if you do, Range is instead 0, but the Target must _Negate_ (_Reflex_ 8). If they fail, they increase their _Weakness_ to _Fire_ by 1 step and, the next time they take _Fire_ Damage, they automatically gain _Alight_ 4. If they succeed, instead place _Oil_ in their _Arena_ as normal. Flame Spirits are immune to this effect, and instead gain 5 _Stamina_ or _Guard_ in any combination.

name: Seed Bomb
desc: A collection of seeds wrapped around a core of powerful wood spiritual energy, allowing one to immediately cover an area in verdant green.
effect: When imbued with a trace amount of spiritual energy this will violently detonate a short time after, spreading a huge growth of green across the area, regardless of how barren it was before. The plants persist, but after a few hours the magic sustaining their growth fades, causing them to act as normal plants would.

abilities.name: Spread Green
abilities.effect: The target _Arena_ becomes covered in resilient plant life and gains [_Fertile_].

name: Thunderstone
desc: A fragile crystal that, when shattered, emits a vicious blast of light and sound.
effect: This stone, when hit with sufficient force, detonates in a concussive blast of light and sound that can destroy objects or act as a signal.

abilities.name: Fling
abilities.effect:
All creatures in an _Engagement_ within Range must immediately _Negate_ [8 _Grit_].
* On a success, they are _Grazed_.
* On a failure, they are _Hit_.

name: Firestone
desc: A fragile crystal that, when shattered, unleashes a powerful, burning explosion.
effect: This stone, when hit with sufficient force, detonates violently, burning those nearby and igniting objects.

abilities.name: Fling
abilities.effect:
All creatures in an _Engagement_ within Range must immediately _Negate_ [8 _Reflex_].
* On a success, they are _Grazed_.
* On a failure, they are _Hit_.

Additionally, _Ignite_ their _Engagement_.

name: Cooking Tools
effect: A large pot, series of ladles, and other assorted cooking odds and ends are enough to cook a wide variety of field meals.
desc: Portable cooking tools that can make anything just a little more palatable.

name: Smithing Tools
effect: A set of simple metal-working tools that can be used to repair Metal equipment while traveling, or handle simple forging if you have access to a forge. It includes a hammer, tongs, and various files.
desc: Portable smithing supplies that are excellent for field repairs of equipment.

name: Sewing Tools
effect: A set of needles, thread, and assorted scrap that can be used to repair appropriate equipment while traveling. This is typically useful for cloth and leather garments.
desc: Sewing supplies that are excellent for field repairs of equipment.

name: Mechanic Tools
effect: A set of picks, small tools, and other equipment useful for working with fine machinery commonly found in the Underworld.
desc: Tools used for dealing with the mechanical bits of the Underworld.

name: Herbalism Tools
effect: A set of simple herbalism tools that can be used to prepare herbs. It includes a mortar and pestle, a few basic alchemical reagents, and tools for harvesting and preserving herbs.
desc: Portable herbalism tools that can be used to create basic remedies and tonics.

name: Fishing Rod
desc: A basic fishing rod useful for rummaging food while traveling.

abilities.name: Fish
abilities.effect: Whenever you make camp, you may choose to set your fishing line and roll on the applicable **Fishing Chart** at _Disadvantage. If you use your _Camp Action_, roll normally.

name: Burning Ruby
desc: A large ruby that contains a flickering flame, providing a powerful source of power to a spirit.
effect: When you would _Manifest_ your spirit at _Respite_, you may choose to _Manifest_ them a _Melee_ _Range_ at no cost. If you do, they have _Advantage_ on all rolls and gain an additional 2 _Momentum_ every _Round_ until they are _Downed_. The Burning Ruby is consumed as a part of this.

name: Smokestick
desc: A stout stick that, when struck, continues to produce smoke for an extended period of time.
effect: This may be used to create a smokescreen that lasts approximately half an hour, obscuring vision within a short distance.

abilities.name: Light
abilities.effect: Choose an _Arena_ within Range, then fling this item there. It immediately becomes _Veiled_, and re-applies _Veiled_ at the start of each _Round_. Stop the effect if the Smokestick becomes wet (either from a _Water_ effect, gaining _Soaked_, or similar) or is damaged by a non-_Fire_ Attack.

name: Grappling Hook
desc: A metal hook that, when properly secured and with the help of a rope, can be used to climb sheer surfaces.
effect: This may be used to assist in climbing surfaces when coupled with a rope.

name: Relaxation Item
desc: An item useful for relaxation, such as a pipe, tea set, puzzle, or journal.
effect: Describe what this item is; it may be useful in certain situations.
special: You may choose to have a bulkier version of this item that takes an additional 1-2 _Load_; if you do, gain an equivalent bonus to the roll used for this item.

abilities.name: Enhanced Relaxation
abilities.effect: When you take the _Rest_ _Camp Action_ you may use this item to attempt to clear _Stress_. Roll a d6; on a 4+, clear one _Stress_. After failing the roll, you may choose to _Shatter_ this item to automatically succeed.

name: Gaming Set
desc: A deck of cards, portable chess set, or some other item that can be used to unwind.

abilities.name: Game Night
abilities.effect: When you take the _Connect_ _Camp Action_ you may use this item to attempt to clear _Stress_. Roll a d6; on a 4+, you win the game and have _Advantage_ on your roll to clear a _Stress_. On a 3-, the other character wins and has _Advantage_ on their roll instead.

name: Pampering Tool
desc: A set of fireproof combs, a ball that can stand up to an earth spirit's jaws, or some other tool that can be used to entertain or groom your spirit.
effect: Describe what this item is; it may be useful in certain situations.
special: You may choose to have a bulkier version of this item that takes an additional 1-2 _Load_; if you do, gain an equivalent bonus to the roll used for this item.

abilities.name: Enhanced Pampering
abilities.effect: When you take the _Pamper_ _Camp Action_ you may use this item to attempt to clear _Stress_. Roll a d6; on a 4+, you or your Spirit may clear an additional _Stress_. After failing the roll, you may choose to _Shatter_ this item to automatically succeed.

name: Herbalism Supplies
desc: A collection of herbs that only a skilled herbalist knows how to use.
effect:
This item is a collection of herbs with no clear use, but can be combined in a variety of ways:
* Gain tea, mild drugs, or some other relaxing substances. You may _Cut Loose_, but roll -1 die on your _Rest Roll_.
* Gain basic medicine; it may be used for the _Patch_ _Camp Action_.

_Herbalist_s have many additional ways to use these.

name: Supplies
desc: The many supplies needed for travel such as food, water, medicine, and various expendable bits needed to make camp.
effect:
This item is a rough collection of a variety of supplies needed for travel. During the _Camp Phase_ you may this for a variety of effects:
* Gain two _Poor Meals_ or one _Basic Meal_.
* Gain a day's worth of water.
* Gain firewood and other resources needed to sustain a fire for the night.
* Gain alcohol, mild drugs, or some other relaxing substances. You may _Cut Loose_, but roll -1 die on your _Rest Roll_.
* Gain basic medicine; it may be used for the _Patch_ _Camp Action_.

Many toolkits and _Careers_ supply additional ways to spend Supplies. Additionally, when traveling in harsh terrain _Supplies_ may be required to make camp or otherwise endure. Finally, Supplies may be expended without a _Camp Action_ when they would be useful for traveling or in combat, such as to provide torches or similar expendable items.

name: Camping Kit
desc: A small tarp that can be used as a tent, short lengths of rope, a bedroll, and other assorted supplies that are sufficient to rest comfortably in mild conditions.
effect: This camping equipment is sufficient to rest in mild conditions, but doesn't provide any special protection against the climate.

name: Poultice
effect: If used for _Patch_, that character may mark an additional segment on a _Wound_.

name: Antidote
effect: This may be used as if it was _Medicine_ for a non-Spirit character suffering from an _Envenomed_ _Wound_; if it is, the character may mark an additional two segments on the Wound.

abilities.name: Drink
abilities.reqs: May not be used by Spirits.
abilities.effect: Create an [_Opening_]. Reduce your _Poisoned_ value by 4 or you may _Negate_ against an active [_Poisoned_] effect, rolling with _Advantage_.

name: Rope
desc: 15 meters of rope. There is absolutely no use for rope on adventures, it has yet to be found.

name: Lantern
desc: A small metal lantern that, with appropriate fuel, can provide light for an extended period.
effect: Any _Supplies_ used to create light with this have a greatly increased effect and duration.

name: Iron Spikes
desc: Long iron spikes that have a wide variety of uses, such as pitons or as a projectile for those with lodecraft.

name: Spices
desc: A variety of cooking spices that can be used to improve the quality of food.
effect: While taking the <u>Cook</u> _Camp Action_ you can use spices to improve the quality of a _Meal_ by 1, up to a maximum of Good. One use of this is enough for a single portion of food.

name: Salt
desc: Salt, useful for both harassing air spirits and preserving food.
effect: A single use of this may be used to preserve a _Meal_ that is predominately meat, such as from _Hunting_ or _Fishing_. It becomes a _Ration_, which may be consumed at any point during the journey. Additionally, if used as a a part of _Improvised Attack_, inflict _Poisoned_ 2 on any Wind spirit it _Hits_ for each use. Up to two uses may be thrown at once.

name: Sleep Toxin
desc: A poison that makes an opponent drowsy, limiting their speeds.

abilities.name: Apply
abilities.effect: Create an [_Opening_] and apply this Poison to a _Wielded_ or _Worn_ Item. The next time you make a creature lose _Stamina_ with a [_Stab_] or [_Slash_] Effect using said Item, they immediately take 4 _Stun_ and must _Negate_ [_Grit_ 10] if they're an animal, human, or other natural creature. This is a [_Poison_] effect. If they fail, they gain <u>Drowsy</u>. <u>Drowsy</u> creatures act one _Phase_ later than they normally would and, at Respite, lose 4 _Guard_ and gain 1 less _Posture_ and _Speed_. If they end the combat with this Poison still afflicted, they gain _Fatigue_.

name: Sleeping Draught
desc: A potion that allows you to sleep deeply, even in the middle of a storm.
effect: A character that drinks this may roll _Boldly_ on their _Rest Roll_ and gains +1 die, but roll one less die on their Travel Roll the following day.

name: Dreamweed
desc: A plant that helps induce sleep. It's also known as rabbitbane, as any small game that goes near it tends to fall asleep and is found by a lucky predator.
effect: This may be Refined into a _Sleeping Draught_, _Sleep Toxin_, or _Water Essence_. Alternatively, a creature may consume this with a pipe or similar to gain +1 die on their _Rest Roll_, but roll one less die on their _Travel Roll_ the following day.

name: Heart of the Vine
desc: A vine that is powerfully infused with wood spirits that is constantly moving and twitching like a wriggling tentacle.
effect: This may be Refined into a _Living Vine_ or 3 _Wood Essence_.

name: Living Vine
desc: This potion is full of coiling, twisting vines that search eagerly for a place to grow.

abilities.name: Drink
abilities.reqs: Must be a natural creature of a _Wood Spirit_.
abilities.effect: Create an [_Opening_], lose 4 _Guard_, and gain 2 _Momentum_. Two vines immediately sprout from your back, each of which counts as an additional hand. Any _Melee_ effect used with these vines is instead Range 0 [_Reach_]. Additionally, at Respite gain 2 _Momentum_ and 1 _Posture_. This persists for the remainder of the encounter; at the end of the scene the vines wither away, but must be removed; gain _Stress_ from the pain of having them extracted.

name: Healing Essence
desc: Refined spiritual essence that lacks a distinct elemental affinity, tends to have a potent healing effect on living creatures. It is unsafe to use in this state.

name: Wood Essence
desc: Refined spiritual essence that channels the concentrated power of wood spirits. It is unsafe to use in this state.

name: Water Essence
desc: Refined spiritual essence that channels the concentrated power of water spirits. It is unsafe to use in this state.
